title: premna khasiana
intro: Premna khasiana, also known as Khasian premna, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Premna khasiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures are made from the plant's leaves and stems, and are used to treat various ailments.
